_patch_meta.produced_by: Session B v4.7 Stage 1 — Data Audit and Remediation
_patch_meta.description: Stage 1 field-level corrections: (1) G8849 confirmed delete with exclusion_reason; (2) H3724B/C/D null exclusion_reason corrected; (3) G8849 added to strongs_list with count=0.

set.exclusion_reason: LXX-only term. All 8 occurrences are in Greek OT (LXX): Neh 9:17, 9:31; Psa 86:5, 103:8; Joel 2:13; Jon 4:2. Programme corpus is ESV-based; these verses are covered by active Hebrew terms H7349 and H2617A. Zero NT occurrences. Corpus scope exclusion.
set.status_note: Confirmed delete in Session B Stage 1. Candidate_delete promoted to delete on corpus scope grounds.

operations.description: G8849 polueleos — confirm delete. LXX-only term; zero ESV corpus occurrences; corpus scope exclusion.

set.exclusion_reason: Homonymous with H3724A (ransom) via kap.har root. Sense: asphalt/pitch as physical covering material (Gen 6:14). No inner-being content. The covering concept is analytically present in H3722A (kip.per/atone). Corpus scope exclusion.

operations.description: H3724B ko.pher (pitch) — document null exclusion_reason. Deletion confirmed.

set.exclusion_reason: Homonymous with H3724A (ransom) via kap.har root. Sense: henna plant (Song 1:14, 4:13). No inner-being content. Corpus scope exclusion.

operations.description: H3724C ko.pher (henna) — document null exclusion_reason. Deletion confirmed.

set.exclusion_reason: Homonymous with H3724A (ransom) via kap.har root. Sense: village/settlement (topographic). No inner-being content. Corpus scope exclusion.

operations.description: H3724D ko.pher (village) — document null exclusion_reason. Deletion confirmed.
Add G8849 to strongs_list with count=0. Term is confirmed delete but must appear in strongs_list per CC design (all terms in registry represented).

verse_context_record_count (1748) confirmed correct. Field counts all verse_context table records for this registry (assigned + set-aside). Value is 1748 = 1051 assigned contexts + 697 set-aside records. No correction required. Confirmed by researcher 2026-04-11.

session_b_findings export schema inconsistency: top-level session_b_findings array is empty; the single finding (DIM-111-001) lives in session_b.findings block. The statistics field session_b_finding_count=1 correctly reflects the actual finding. CC to confirm whether the export schema should populate the top-level array or whether this is by design.
